title: Cross-database discordance as a drug-safety artefact filter (FAERS-DAEN) — analysis code
description: Reproducibility code for the pre-registered study "Cross-database discordance as a drug-safety artefact filter: a pre-registered FAERS-DAEN test, and the power-conditioning circularity that would have manufactured its confirmation." Implements the MDE-anchored power model, the per-pair 2x2 disproportionality pipeline in FAERS and DAEN, the ground-truth artefact-enrichment test, and all sensitivity arms and figures.
